betterquesting:10.desc:8:
If you are playing with friends, make sure to invite them in your BetterQuesting Party as to share progression and rewards.

This quest book does not contain all the content from the mod, such as the guns, many armor sets and others. Make sure to browse NEI.

When updating the modpack to newer versions that has introduced changes to the quest book, in case the quests dont update or complete, delete the betterquesting folder in the world file.
After it is deleted, turn on cheats and do "/bq_admin edit true", head over to the chapter of your choice, press the designer button (the one with many squares), click on your quest of choice and finally press the autocomplete button (checkmark) to complete the quests previously completed.
